tools.name: create_pattern
tools.description: Create and save a LED pattern to a persistent slot (1-5). The pattern is defined by mathematical expressions for Hue, Saturation, and Brightness. Variables: theta (0~2pi), t (time in seconds), i (LED index 0~11), pi, var_a, var_b, var_c. Operators: +, -, *, /, %, <, >, <=, >=, ==, !=, &&, ||, !. Functions: sin, cos, tan, abs, sqrt, floor, ceil, max(a,b), min(a,b), mod(a,b), pow(a,b). Examples: 1. Police: hue=(sin(t*10)>0)*0+(sin(t*10)<=0)*4.2, sat=1, val=1 2. Comet: hue=t*0.5, sat=1, val=max(0,1-abs(mod(theta-t*5,2*pi))) 3. Pulse: hue=3.0, sat=1, val=(sin(t*2)+1)/2*var_a (var_a is audio)

slot.description: Slot number to save to (1-5). Slot 0 is reserved.

tools.name: change_slot
tools.description: Change device state to execute a specific pattern slot. Slot 0: Stop pattern and return to IDLE (Blinking). Slots 1-5: Execute persistent pattern. Slot 6: Blackout (Turn off all LEDs). Duration > 0: Auto-return to IDLE after time. Duration = 0: Loop forever (Default).

duration.description: Duration in seconds. 0 = Infinite loop (until changed).

tools.name: slot_status
tools.description: Check the status of all pattern slots (1-5). Returns name, formulas, valid status, and active status for each slot.

duration.description: Duration in seconds. 0 = Infinite loop (until changed).

tools.name: read_temperature_humidity
tools.description: 현재 온도/습도를 읽고 outport로 내보내며, 최근 24시간을 계층형 요약 버퍼(1min, 10min, 30min, 1hour, 6hour, 24hour)로 조회합니다.

window.description: Optional. history resolution to return: 1min, 10min, 30min, 1hour, 6hour, 24hour. Omit for current value only.

limit.description: Optional. Number of points to return. Default 20.

tools.name: read_temperature_humidity
tools.description: 현재 온도/습도를 읽고 outport로 내보내며, 최근 24시간을 계층형 요약 버퍼(1min, 10min, 30min, 1hour, 6hour, 24hour)로 조회합니다.

window.description: Optional. history resolution to return: 1min, 10min, 30min, 1hour, 6hour, 24hour. Omit for current value only.

limit.description: Optional. Number of points to return. Default 20.

tools.name: create_pattern
tools.description:
Play a LED pattern with mathematical expressions (temporary - not saved). Use this to test patterns or create one-time effects. Variables: theta (0~2π), t (time in seconds), i (LED index 0~11). Functions: sin, cos, tan, abs, sqrt, floor, ceil, max(a,b), min(a,b), mod(a,b), pow(a,b). Operators: +, -, *, /, %, <, >, <=, >=, ==, !=, &&, ||, !. Examples:
- Rotating rainbow: hue='theta+t', sat='1', brightness='0.5'
- Half split (red/cyan): hue='(i < 6) * 0 + (i >= 6) * 3.14', sat='1', brightness='0.5'
- Even LEDs only: brightness='(i % 2 == 0) * 1.0'
- Pulsing: brightness='sin(t*2)*0.5+0.5'
- Complex: hue='(i >= 3 && i <= 8) * (theta + t)', sat='1', brightness='0.8'

slot.description: Slot number to save to (1-5). Slot 0 is reserved.

tools.name: execute_pattern
tools.description: Execute a pattern from a slot. Slot 0 stops any pattern and returns to default blinking. Slots 1-5 play the saved pattern for the specified duration.

duration.description: Duration in seconds to play. Ignored for slot 0.

tools.name: list_patterns
tools.description: List all saved patterns in slots 1-5.
